days.notes: Plain-English: 'What AI for your design studio actually means.' Interior-grounded, anchors the Bridge 1 week.
Bridge 1 intro: building an AI system for interior design firms. Name the ICP pain (mood board/specs/render done by hand).
PROOF: pipeline running mood board -> palette -> material/BOQ sheet -> plan-faithful render. NEEDS user-supplied demo project + assets. Soft client CTA tail.
Render blocker: 'AI kept moving the furniture' V1->V4 story. Before/after render images (user-supplied). Soft client CTA tail.
Stock-analysis recap + promote YT1. YT1 = stock-analysis long-form (edit-ready: LoomWalkthroughs/final_v2_nohud_1.2x.mp4).

Wake-up call (written): get basics right before chasing AI. LECTURE-RISK: frame as observation not scolding, hard five-value check (Respect the owner). Promotes YT2. YT2 = wake-up-call video + free Gemini Gem lead magnet (record this week).
Free Gem lead-magnet offer: 'free AI advisor for design/architecture firms — try it.' + plan Week 3 + run metrics auditor.
YT3 (live build with sister's firm) PREP ONLY this week. Ships Week 3. Needs: shoot plan, interview clips, real demo project, template. Use loom-walkthrough-recorder.
